Because no allocator/sanitizer frames or native helper functions are present, I cannot perform the mandated memcpy/memmove / length tracing—there is simply no information about any memory operation or parameter propagation beyond the fact that a fuzz harness calls this JNI entrypoint and the process terminates there.

Given the lack of concrete evidence of unsafe operations, attacker-controlled parameters, or realistic paths in the app, I should treat this as an unclassified fuzz termination with insufficient data, leaning toward non-vulnerability under the provided criteria.
